properties.name: ksef.base-url
properties.description: Advanced: send KSeF traffic to this base URL instead of the environment default host (e.g. a reverse proxy or gateway fronting the selected environment). The environment still selects the encryption certificate.

properties.name: ksef.auth.token
properties.description: KSeF API token generated in the MCU after authenticating as the taxpayer.

properties.name: ksef.context.nip
properties.description: Taxpayer NIP used as the API context.

properties.name: ksef.archive.directory
properties.description: Directory where sent invoices and UPOs are persisted. Unset uses a no-op archive.

properties.name: ksef.upo.poll-timeout
properties.description: How long to wait for the UPO after sending.
